formosa-font/01.webp.en: A white booklet with a minimalist cover features a delicate rose-gold botanical illustration of a stylized flower above bilingual typography reading "FORMOSA FONT 福爾摩沙" and "原生植物歐文字體設計" in a refined mix of Latin and Chinese characters set against a dark background.
formosa-font/01.webp.zh: 白色書冊封面以深色背景襯托，上方印有細緻玫瑰金線條的植物花卉插圖，下方以中英文混排字體呈現「FORMOSA FONT 福爾摩沙」及「原生植物歐文字體設計」等文字，整體設計典雅精緻。

formosa-font/02.webp.en: Two cream-colored booklets displayed side by side against a black background, featuring elegant botanical line illustrations of a rose and ornamental flora rendered in warm brown ink. The covers showcase the "Formosa Font" typeface with bilingual typography pairing Latin letterforms and Traditional Chinese characters, reflecting the project's theme of Taiwan's native plant-inspired type design.
formosa-font/02.webp.zh: 兩本米白色小冊子並排陳列於黑色背景前，封面與封底以溫潤棕色線條描繪精緻植物插圖，呈現玫瑰花卉的優雅輪廓。封面以大寫拉丁字體「FORMOSA FONT」搭配繁體中文「福爾摩沙 摩沙 原生植物藏文字體設計」，中英文字型編排呼應本專案以臺灣原生植物為靈感的字體設計主題。

formosa-font/03.webp.en: A cream-colored booklet for the Formosa Font project displayed flat and upright against a black background, featuring a delicate botanical line illustration at the top and bilingual typography pairing elegant serif Latin lettering with Chinese characters for the title "FORMOSA FONT 原生植物歐文字體設計."
formosa-font/03.webp.zh: 米白色書冊平放與直立陳列於黑色背景前，封面上方印有以細線勾勒的植物紋樣徽標，下方以優雅的襯線拉丁字母與繁體中文搭配排列，呈現「FORMOSA FONT 原生植物歐文字體設計」字樣。

formosa-font/04.webp.en: Two cream-white booklets for "Formosa Font" are displayed on a dark surface, their covers featuring a delicate botanical illustration of a rose alongside bilingual typography that mixes elegant serif Latin lettering with traditional Chinese characters.
formosa-font/04.webp.zh: 兩本奶白色《Formosa Font》小冊子置於深色背景上，封面以細膩的植物線描玫瑰圖案為主視覺，搭配優雅的英文襯線字體與繁體中文字體，中英文字體並置展現本書的雙語字型設計主題。

formosa-font/05.webp.en: The spine of the Formosa Font book stands upright against a dark background, showing the title "FORMOSA FONT" in Latin letters at the top and vertical Chinese text below. The minimal white cover contrasts sharply with the black backdrop, highlighting the clean typographic layout.
formosa-font/05.webp.zh: 福爾摩沙字體書籍的書脊直立於深黑色背景前，頂端印有拉丁文字「FORMOSA FONT」，下方則以直排漢字呈現副標題，白色封面與黑色背景形成強烈對比，突顯簡潔俐落的字型排版設計。

formosa-font/06.webp.en: A cream-white booklet cover set against a dark background, featuring an ornate gold botanical line illustration above the bilingual title "Formosa Font / 福爾摩沙 FONT" and the subtitle "8 Typefaces / 原生植物歐文字體設計," rendered in elegant gold serif and sans-serif lettering.
formosa-font/06.webp.zh: 一本米白色小冊子立於深黑色背景前，封面以金棕色燙印呈現精緻的植物線條紋章圖案，下方依序排列「FORMOSA」、「福爾 FONT 摩沙」、「原生植物歐文字體設計」及「8 TYPEFACES」等雙語標題，字體兼具優雅的襯線與現代無襯線風格。

formosa-font/07.webp.en: The back cover of a slim white booklet photographed against a dark background, featuring the gold-foil "FORMOSA" logotype flanked by ornate flourishes, with bilingual body text in Latin and Chinese describing Taiwan's endemic plant life and the typeface's design concept.
formosa-font/07.webp.zh: 深色背景前一本纖薄白色小冊子的封底，中央印有燙金「FORMOSA」字樣，兩側飾以古典花紋裝飾，上下方排列中英雙語內文，介紹台灣特有植物生態與字體設計概念。

formosa-font/08.webp.en: Front and back covers of the Formosa Font booklet displayed against a dark background, featuring an ornate gold botanical emblem and the title "FORMOSA FONT 8 TYPEFACES" in elegant serif typography alongside Chinese characters, printed on cream-white stock.
formosa-font/08.webp.zh: 福爾摩沙字體小冊子的正面與背面封面並排展示於深色背景前，封面印有金色植物線描徽章及「FORMOSA FONT 8 TYPEFACES 福爾摩沙原生植物歐文字體設計」字樣，以典雅的襯線體與中文混排呈現，印於米白色書冊上。

formosa-font/09.webp.en: A cream-colored booklet for Formosa Font displayed front and back against a dark background, featuring elegant gold foil typography that blends Latin letterforms with Chinese characters and a delicate botanical line illustration on the cover.
formosa-font/09.webp.zh: 奶白色的福爾摩沙字體小冊子正反面展示於深色背景上，封面印有精緻的金箔燙印文字，將拉丁字母與漢字融合設計，並搭配細膩的植物線條插圖。

formosa-font/10.webp.en: A printed booklet titled "Formosa Font — 8 Typefaces" lies at an angle on a dark surface, its cream-white cover featuring elegant serif Latin lettering alongside vertical Chinese text, with a delicate botanical line illustration in the upper right corner.
formosa-font/10.webp.zh: 一本名為「Formosa Font — 8 Typefaces」的印刷書冊斜放於深色桌面上，米白色封面以優雅的大型英文襯線字排列書名，並搭配直排繁體中文「原生植物叢文字體設計」，右上角點綴著細膩的植物線條插圖。

formosa-font/11.webp.en: An open book spread with cream-colored pages, featuring the ornate "FORMOSA" logotype surrounded by decorative calligraphic flourishes printed in dark brown ink. Body text in an elegant serif typeface reads about the design combining Latin typefaces with Taiwan's native plant life.
formosa-font/11.webp.zh: 攤開的書頁以奶油色紙張為底，深棕色印刷呈現裝飾性手寫體「FORMOSA」標誌，四周環繞花體卷曲紋飾；下方以優雅的義大利斜體正文說明此字體設計結合拉丁字型與台灣原生植物，將台灣帶上世界舞台。

formosa-font/12.webp.en: A soft-cover book photographed at an angle against a dark background, showing the spine and front cover with "FORMOSA FONT" in serif lettering alongside Chinese characters, printed on cream-white paper with elegant black typography.
formosa-font/12.webp.zh: 一本米白色軟封面書籍以斜角構圖攝於深色背景前，書脊與封面清晰可見「FORMOSA FONT」英文襯線字與「福爾摩沙字體」中文字樣，以細膩黑色印刷呈現優雅的字體設計質感。

formosa-font/13.webp.en: A close-up of an open book spreads across a dark surface, its white pages bearing the text "FORMOSA FONT" in delicate serif type alongside flowing, ink-drawn calligraphic flourishes that resemble spiraling botanical forms. The soft-focus photography and dramatic low-key lighting emphasize the refined, hand-crafted quality of the printed design.
formosa-font/13.webp.zh: 攤開的書本特寫，白色書頁上以細緻的襯線字體印有「FORMOSA FONT」字樣，並搭配手繪風格的螺旋植物紋飾插圖。低調的暗色背景與柔焦攝影手法，烘托出印刷設計精緻而手工感的質感。

formosa-font/14.webp.en: An open book spread displaying the Formosa Font title page with ornate calligraphic lettering and decorative flourishes on the left, alongside a right page listing Latin and Chinese names of Taiwan's native plant species used as typographic inspiration.
formosa-font/14.webp.zh: 一本翻開的書籍跨頁，左頁以華麗的手寫風花體字呈現「FORMOSA FONT」標題及字體設計說明，搭配裝飾性捲曲線條；右頁條列台灣原生植物的拉丁學名與對應中文名稱，作為字體設計的靈感來源。

formosa-font/15.webp.en: An open specimen book displays the full glyph set of an ornate calligraphic typeface, with uppercase and lowercase letterforms arranged in rows across cream-white pages against a dark background. The elegant script characters feature elaborate swashes and fine hairline strokes, shown at multiple weights and sizes in a clean typographic layout.
formosa-font/15.webp.zh: 一本攤開的字型字集樣本書，展示精緻書法風格字型的完整字符集，奶白色頁面上依序排列大寫、小寫與替代字形，以多行整齊呈現。字符筆畫纖細優雅，帶有繁複的花體裝飾，背景為深黑色，對比鮮明地突顯字型的細節層次。

formosa-font/16.webp.en: An open spread of The Book of Formosa Font showing elegantly typeset specimen pages with ornate serif and calligraphic typefaces, floral ornaments, and structured font information layouts printed in black on cream paper against a dark background.
formosa-font/16.webp.zh: 《福爾摩沙字體》書籍攤開的跨頁，展示精緻的字體樣本排版，包含華麗的襯線體與書法字體、花飾裝飾紋樣，以及結構清晰的字體資訊版面，以黑色印於米白色紙張，置於深色背景上。

formosa-font/17.webp.en: A close-up photograph of a thick white-paged book opened to reveal its cover, displaying an elegant serif typeface with a stylized "A" and the word "FONT" in refined letterforms. The shallow depth of field and dark background emphasize the crisp, high-contrast black typography against the bright white paper.
formosa-font/17.webp.zh: 一本厚實白頁書籍攤開的近拍照，封面印有優雅的襯線字體，以風格化的「A」字母搭配「FONT」字樣構成精緻排版。淺景深與深色背景突顯白色紙張上細膩高對比的黑色字形，呈現出典雅的字體設計質感。

formosa-font/18.webp.en: An open book photographed at a shallow depth of field, showing white pages printed with elegant cursive script typography in black ink, including the word "Lycopodium" prominently on the right page. The soft-focus composition emphasizes the graceful letterforms of the Formosa Font against crisp white paper.
formosa-font/18.webp.zh: 攤開的書本以淺景深拍攝，白色書頁上印有福爾摩沙字體的黑色草寫字型，右頁「Lycopodium」字樣清晰可見。柔焦構圖突顯了字體優雅流暢的筆觸，與潔白紙張形成鮮明對比。

foucault-book-binding/01.webp.en: A flat-lay arrangement of redesigned book covers for Foucault's works, featuring bold geometric color-block compositions in pastel pink, lavender, peach, and sage green against a dark background. The covers mix Chinese and English typography with structured grid layouts, referencing titles such as *The Order of Things* and *The Archaeology of Knowledge*.
foucault-book-binding/01.webp.zh: 多本傅柯著作重新設計的書封以平鋪方式排列於深色背景上，封面採用粉紅、薰衣草紫、米杏與墨綠色的幾何色塊構圖。中英文字體混排於結構性網格版面，書名包括《事物的秩序》與《知識考古學》。

foucault-book-binding/02.webp.en: A flat-lay spread of multiple book cover designs for Foucault's works, featuring a mix of pastel pink, teal, yellow, and black panels with large-scale Chinese and Latin typography arranged in dynamic diagonal compositions. The designs combine dense body text, bold ideographic characters, and classical photographic imagery to evoke themes of knowledge, archaeology, and order.
foucault-book-binding/02.webp.zh: 多本傅柯著作書封設計的平鋪展示，以粉紅、青綠、黑色與黃色幾何色塊構成斜角動態版面，融合大尺度繁體中文標題——「知識考古學」、「詞與物」、「事物的秩序」——與細密的正文排版及古典黑白攝影，呈現知識與秩序的視覺張力。

foucault-book-binding/03.webp.en: Multiple stacked book sets arranged in a repeating isometric pattern against a dark background, each set featuring the same cover design with geometric blocks of teal, pink, yellow, and white, bilingual typography in Latin and Chinese characters, and the series title "épistémè" in bold serif type.
foucault-book-binding/03.webp.zh: 多套書籍組合以等角透視重複排列於深色背景上，每套封面由墨綠、粉紫、鵝黃等幾何色塊構成，搭配中英雙語排版，並以粗體襯線字呈現系列名稱「épistémè」。

foucault-book-binding/04.webp.en: Two Foucault book designs are laid diagonally on a dark surface — the upper book features dense newsprint-style text with a yellow panel printed with large pink Chinese characters, while the lower book displays a geometric color-block cover in salmon, teal, and grey with the title "The Order of Things" in clean sans-serif type alongside Chinese typography.
foucault-book-binding/04.webp.zh: 兩本傅柯書籍設計斜置於深色背景上——上方書本以密集報紙風格文字為底，側邊搭配印有粉紅色大型漢字的黃色色塊；下方書本封面採幾何色塊構圖，融合鮭魚粉、深綠與灰藍色調，以無襯線字體印有「The Order of Things」書名及中文排版。

foucault-book-binding/05.webp.en: A collection of book spines and pages fanned together, displaying mixed typography in both Chinese and French/English — including the title "The Order of Things" in bold sans-serif — with pastel pink, green, and neutral tones creating a layered, editorial composition. Dense text columns and structured layouts evoke Foucault's themes of knowledge systems and disciplinary order.
foucault-book-binding/05.webp.zh: 數本書脊與書頁交疊展開，呈現中文、法文與英文混排的多層次排版設計，其中「The Order of Things」以粗體無襯線字型醒目呈現，粉紅、淺綠與中性色調交織，形成富有編輯感的構圖。密集的文字欄位與嚴謹的版面結構，呼應傅柯對知識系統與秩序分類的核心思想。

foucault-book-binding/06.webp.en: Three white ribbon bookmarks printed with layered Chinese characters and bilingual text are arranged diagonally against a dark background, their typographic surfaces combining dense East Asian script with Latin text in a structured, grid-like pattern that evokes archival order and textual authority.
foucault-book-binding/06.webp.zh: 三條白色緞帶書籤以斜角方式排列於深色背景上，表面印有密集的中文字符與英文書名交疊，黑白相間的網格排版結合細密的字體層次，呈現出檔案秩序般的嚴謹視覺質感。

foucault-book-binding/07.webp.en: A flat-lay arrangement of multiple book covers and a rolled poster spread across a dark surface, featuring bold geometric color blocking in pink, yellow, lavender, and grey alongside large-scale Chinese and Latin typography. The designs for Foucault's works blend bilingual typographic systems with photographic fragments, creating a structured yet dynamic visual identity across the series.
foucault-book-binding/07.webp.zh: 多本傅柯著作書籍與一捲海報平鋪於深色背景上，封面以粉紅、黃色、薰衣草紫與灰色幾何色塊構成，搭配大尺度中英雙語排版，漢字與拉丁字母交織形成強烈的視覺節奏。

foucault-book-binding/08.webp.en: A flat-lay arrangement of multiple book covers and printed materials on a dark surface, featuring a coordinated design system in pastel pink, yellow, green, and white with bold Chinese and English typography, including the title *The Order of Things* alongside geometric shapes and dense typographic layouts referencing Foucault's texts.
foucault-book-binding/08.webp.zh: 多本書籍封面與印刷品以平鋪方式排列於深色背景上，採用粉紅、黃、綠、白等粉彩色調構成統一設計系統，搭配粗體中英文字體呈現「事物的秩序」、「知識考古學」等傅柯著作書名，幾何色塊與密集排版相互交織，展現結構嚴謹的視覺識別體系。

foucault-book-binding/09.webp.en: A flat-lay arrangement of book covers and a spine against a dark background, featuring embossed Traditional Chinese characters in muted beige tones. The textured surfaces contrast with a densely typeset spine in the center, creating a layered composition that evokes archival and classical print traditions.
foucault-book-binding/09.webp.zh: 深色背景上平鋪排列多件書封與書脊，封面以米白色紙張呈現浮雕漢字，文字若隱若現地融入紙紋肌理；中央一冊黑色書脊密排細小繁體中文字，與右側窄長書側的深灰排版形成層次對比，整體構圖兼具檔案美學與古典印刷的沉靜氛圍。

foucault-book-binding/10.webp.en: Two book covers for *The Archaeology of Knowledge* by Michel Foucault displayed side by side against a dark background, featuring a geometric pastel color-block layout in soft pink, lavender, yellow, and grey with layered Chinese and Latin typography printed in contrasting white and black.
foucault-book-binding/10.webp.zh: 兩本《知識考古學》書籍並排陳列於深色背景前，封面採用粉紅、薰衣草紫、淡黃與灰色幾何色塊拼接設計，繁體中文大字標題與細緻的拉丁文排版以白色和黑色交疊印刷，呈現層次豐富的現代主義視覺風格。

foucault-book-binding/11.webp.en: Two book cover designs for *The Archaeology of Knowledge* stand side by side against a dark background — the front cover features bold pink, pale blue, and cream geometric panels with large Chinese characters and layered bilingual typography, while the spine displays dense horizontal striped patterning with Chinese text and coil binding hardware.
foucault-book-binding/11.webp.zh: 兩本《知識考古學》書籍並排立於深色背景前，正面封面以粉紅、淡藍與米白幾何色塊構成，搭配粗體中文字與雙語排版層疊設計；書脊則以密集橫條紋圖案為底，印有中文書名，並可見螺旋裝訂的金屬線圈裸露於側。

foucault-book-binding/12.webp.en: A book design system for Foucault's *The Archaeology of Knowledge* featuring an unfolded dust jacket alongside a book and bookmark, using a geometric grid of pink, pale blue, gold, and grey panels. Bold Chinese characters and bilingual Latin typography are layered over collaged newsprint textures and archival imagery, conveying the themes of knowledge, discontinuity, and contingency.
foucault-book-binding/12.webp.zh: 展開的書腰設計以粉紅、淺藍、金與灰色幾何色塊分割版面，疊印粗體中文字「知識考古學」、「間斷性」、「偶然性」等關鍵詞及法文書名，舊報紙紋理與檔案影像穿插其中。左側並排書本與書籤，整體呈現傅柯思想中知識斷裂與偶然性的視覺主題。

foucault-book-binding/13.webp.en: An open book spread displaying a bilingual table of contents — English on the left page over a warm yellow background, Chinese on the right — with a bold graphic inset at the bottom combining a monochrome skull image, a hot-pink diagonal block, and large Chinese characters reading "目次" (contents), set against a dark studio backdrop.
foucault-book-binding/13.webp.zh: 展開的書本呈現雙語目錄跨頁，左頁為暖黃底色上的英文章節列表，右頁為中文目錄，書冊下方嵌入一組對比強烈的圖形設計——單色骷髏影像、熱粉紅色斜切色塊與大字「目次」並列，整體置於深色攝影背景中。

foucault-book-binding/14.webp.en: An open book spread featuring bilingual text layout in English and Traditional Chinese, with a warm gold-toned left page and a white right page. A bold pink and grey geometric section divider marks an "Introduction" chapter, with large Chinese characters overlaid in a structured typographic composition.
foucault-book-binding/14.webp.zh: 攤開的書頁呈現中英雙語排版設計，左頁以溫暖金色為底，搭配直排中文與橫排英文並置的構圖；右頁下角以粉紅色與灰色幾何三角形色塊標示「Introduction／導論」章節分隔頁，並以大型中文字「導論」疊印其上，形成結構感強烈的平面排版。

foucault-book-binding/15.webp.en: Two book covers for Foucault's *The Order of Things* displayed side by side against a dark background, featuring bold geometric color-blocking in pink, black, and deep teal, with a bilingual typographic layout mixing large Chinese characters (事物秩序 / 認識型) and Latin text including the word "episteme" in oversized italic type.
foucault-book-binding/15.webp.zh: 兩本傅柯《事物的秩序》書籍封面並排展示於深色背景前，以粉紅、黑、墨綠幾何色塊分割構成版面，融合大尺寸中文字「事物秩序」、「詞與物」及「認識型」與西文斜體「episteme」的雙語排版設計。

foucault-book-binding/16.webp.en: Two book covers for Foucault's *The Order of Things* stand side by side against a dark background — the front cover features a geometric pastel design in pink, black, and white with bold Chinese characters and bilingual English/French titling, while the spine showcases a dense vertical arrangement of white Chinese text on a striped pattern with metallic staple-like details.
foucault-book-binding/16.webp.zh: 兩本《事物的秩序》書籍並排立於深色背景前，正面封面以幾何色塊構成，融合粉紅、黑、白三色，印有「詞與物」等粗體中文字及中英法三語標題與章節目錄；書脊則展示條紋底紋上密排的白色漢字，並綴以金屬釘狀裝飾細節。

foucault-book-binding/17.webp.en: A flat-lay of a book binding design for Michel Foucault's *The Order of Things*, featuring a geometric grid layout with bold diagonal panels in salmon pink, dark green, white, and black. The composition layers bilingual Chinese and English typography with a reproduced classical painting fragment and structured table-of-contents text, creating a visually dense, editorial aesthetic.
foucault-book-binding/17.webp.zh: 書籍裝幀設計平鋪展示，包含一本大開展開頁與兩本封面，採幾何對角線切割構圖，以珊瑚粉、深綠、白與黑為主色塊，搭配中英法三語排版及〈侍女〉古典畫作局部，呈現兼具學術性與編輯感的視覺層次。

foucault-book-binding/18.webp.en: An open book spread featuring a geometric diagram divided into quadrants using intersecting diagonal and orthogonal lines, with sections in white, deep green, and soft peach tones. Chinese and English typography label each zone, with large vertical Chinese characters and "Seventeenth and Eighteenth Centuries" anchoring the lower-right corner against a dark shadow-cast background.
foucault-book-binding/18.webp.zh: 一本攤開的書頁，版面以交叉的對角線與正交線分割成多個象限，呈現白色、深綠色與柔和桃粉色的幾何色塊配置。中英文字標注各區域，右下角以大型直排漢字「世紀十七十八」與英文「Seventeenth and Eighteenth Centuries」為視覺錨點，書頁在深色背景下映出輕柔的光影。

foucault-book-binding/19.webp.en: An open book spread photographed on a dark surface, featuring a structured layout with a deep green panel containing a white node diagram on the left page alongside a grey diagram with handwritten-style English annotations, dense vertical Chinese body text, and a salmon-pink geometric triangle accent marking a chapter opening. The typographic design blends Chinese and Latin scripts with diagrammatic infographics, reflecting the analytical visual language of the Foucault book-binding project.
foucault-book-binding/19.webp.zh: 攤開的書本置於深色背景上，左頁上方有深綠底白色節點網絡圖，下方為灰底英文手寫風格示意圖與參考文獻列表；右頁以密排中文內文為主，右下角覆有鮭魚粉幾何三角形搭配「數．二與一」章節標題，中英文混排與資訊圖表的編排呈現傅柯知識體系的分析視覺語言。

foucault-book-binding/20.webp.en: Multiple copies of the book series are stacked in a diagonal arrangement against a dark background, showcasing the spines and covers featuring a pastel color palette of pink, yellow, green, and white with bold bilingual typography in both Chinese characters and Latin script.
foucault-book-binding/20.webp.zh: 多冊書系以對角線方式層疊排列於深色背景上，展示書脊與封面的粉紅、黃、綠、白等粉彩配色，封面採用中英雙語並置的粗體字排版設計。

patterned-glass-notebook/01.webp.en: A collection of handcrafted notebooks and boxes with wood-framed covers featuring textured patterned glass surfaces — including geometric mosaic, star-etched, and rippled or crackled glass designs — arranged in a moody studio still life alongside rough stone props.
patterned-glass-notebook/01.webp.zh: 數本手工製作的筆記本與盒子以木框鑲嵌不同紋理的壓花玻璃封面，包含星形蝕刻、龜裂馬賽克與細密格紋等圖案，搭配粗糙石塊道具排列於幽暗的工作室靜物構圖中。

patterned-glass-notebook/02.webp.en: Three notebooks and a small box with patterned glass covers — featuring diamond-grid, cracked, and ribbed glass textures framed in warm bronze — are arranged on raw concrete blocks against a neutral grey background.
patterned-glass-notebook/02.webp.zh: 三本玻璃壓花封面筆記本與一個小盒擺放於粗獷混凝土塊上，封面分別呈現菱格紋、碎冰紋與直條紋壓花玻璃，搭配溫暖銅色金屬邊框，背景為柔和中性灰調。

patterned-glass-notebook/03.webp.en: Close-up of the notebook's top corner, highlighting a weathered brass-toned metal spine with an embossed circular logo, set against a textured glass cover with a raindrop-like bubble pattern.
patterned-glass-notebook/03.webp.zh: 筆記本頂角特寫，帶有歲月感的古銅色金屬書脊上壓印著圓形品牌標誌，旁側可見玻璃封面上細密的水珠狀氣泡壓花紋理。

patterned-glass-notebook/04.webp.en: A close-up of the packaging box's corner, revealing layered notebook spines with gold-accented edges stacked inside, while the box exterior displays an intricate geometric tile pattern in dark teal and black with embossed badge-style typography.
patterned-glass-notebook/04.webp.zh: 包裝盒角落的特寫，盒內可見多本筆記本書脊整齊疊放，書口帶有金色邊緣；盒身外側印有深青色與黑色的幾何磁磚圖案，搭配浮雕徽章風格的英文字體排版。

patterned-glass-notebook/05.webp.en: A sculptural product still life stacking the patterned-glass notebook and its box alongside raw concrete and stone props, with the diamond-tilted lid revealing a faceted mirror-glass surface and warm gold trim. Kraft-toned label stickers bearing vintage-style typography and icons are layered on the front of the box, contrasted against the cool grey tones of the patterned glass panels below.
patterned-glass-notebook/05.webp.zh: 靜物堆疊構圖中，菱形傾斜的盒蓋掀開，露出切面鏡面玻璃與金色邊框的筆記本內頁，旁側以粗礫石塊與水泥質感道具點綴。盒面貼有多張復古風格標籤貼紙，印有圖示與手寫感字體，與下方冷灰色調壓花玻璃筆記本形成質感對比。

patterned-glass-notebook/06.webp.en: A styled still-life arrangement of multiple notebooks and gift boxes stacked and propped at dynamic angles, featuring covers and interiors clad in gold, silver, and dark wood-toned materials with geometric tile and mosaic patterns. The composition highlights the tactile, layered surfaces and the interplay of metallic and earthy textures across the full product range.
patterned-glass-notebook/06.webp.zh: 多本筆記本與禮盒以動態傾斜角度堆疊陳列，封面與內頁呈現金色、銀色及深木色調，搭配幾何磁磚與馬賽克壓花圖案。畫面突顯整個產品系列豐富的觸感層次，以及金屬光澤與大地色系材質之間的視覺張力。

patterned-glass-notebook/07.webp.en: Multiple laser-etched metal bookmark or template cards featuring geometric and organic glass-pattern engravings are displayed upright inside a dark industrial box, propped on a rough concrete block with a stack of notebooks fanned beneath it.
patterned-glass-notebook/07.webp.zh: 數張刻有幾何與有機玻璃紋樣的金屬書籤或模板卡直立於深色工業感盒中，整組擺放於粗糙混凝土磚塊上，底部夾有展開的筆記本書頁。

patterned-glass-notebook/08.webp.en: An overhead flat-lay of multiple rectangular boxes with warm gold frames, each lid featuring a distinct silver embossed pattern — including floral, geometric, snowflake, honeycomb, and linear textures — arranged in a diagonal grid against a muted teal-green background.
patterned-glass-notebook/08.webp.zh: 俯拍平鋪構圖中，多個金色邊框長方形盒子以對角線排列於墨綠色背景上，每個盒蓋呈現不同的銀色浮雕紋樣，包含花卉、雪花、幾何菱格、蜂巢圓點及線條紋理等，質感細膩且光澤豐富。

patterned-glass-notebook/09.webp.en: Five small framed panels stand side by side against a softly draped grey-green backdrop, each displaying a distinct patterned glass texture — from floral and star motifs to vertical ribbing, a grid mosaic, and shattered fragments — all set in warm gold-toned wooden frames.
patterned-glass-notebook/09.webp.zh: 五個小型金色木框並排陳列於灰綠色柔軟布幕前，各自展示不同的壓花玻璃紋樣——花卉、星形、縱向條紋、方格馬賽克與碎片紋理，質感細膩多變。

patterned-glass-notebook/10.webp.en: A close-up of a kraft-toned notebook standing upright, its spine and cover featuring embossed diamond lattice patterns in warm gold against dark brown. A debossed label reads "Toned Gray" with product details, and two die-cut bookmarks with geometric embossing peek out from the top.
patterned-glass-notebook/10.webp.zh: 一本牛皮色筆記本直立特寫，書脊與封面壓有暖金色菱格紋浮雕，深棕色凹印標籤印有「TONED GRAY」字樣及產品說明，頂端露出兩枚帶幾何壓紋的模切書籤。

patterned-glass-notebook/11.webp.en: Four notebooks fanned open and arranged symmetrically, showcasing covers with a dark marbled glass texture framed in gold, with one spine featuring an intricate blue geometric tile pattern, all set against a soft grey draped background.
patterned-glass-notebook/11.webp.zh: 四本筆記本呈扇形對稱展開，封面飾以深色大理石紋玻璃壓花質感並以金框裱邊，中央書脊印有藍色幾何花磚圖案，整體陳列於柔灰色垂墜布料背景之上。

patterned-glass-notebook/12.webp.en: Two gold-foil notebook spines are photographed diagonally against a muted teal-grey background, their textured metallic surfaces catching dramatic light and shadow. Each spine features a circular stamp imprint with "notebook" lettering, one inverted relative to the other, creating a mirrored composition.
patterned-glass-notebook/12.webp.zh: 兩本燙金筆記本書脊以對角線構圖斜置於灰藍色背景上，粗糙的金箔表面在戲劇性光影下呈現豐富的明暗層次。每條書脊上各有一枚圓形印章壓印，刻有「notebook」字樣，其中一本呈倒置狀，形成上下鏡像對稱的視覺效果。

patterned-glass-notebook/13.webp.en: Close-up of a dark textured notebook cover featuring an embossed geometric pattern of sharp, multi-pointed star motifs connected by fine diagonal lines, rendered in a metallic silver finish against a deep charcoal surface.
patterned-glass-notebook/13.webp.zh: 深炭色筆記本封面的近景特寫，表面壓印著銀色金屬光澤的幾何紋樣——多角尖星以對角細線串聯成網格，光線在凸起的壓紋上形成細膩的反光層次。

patterned-glass-notebook/14.webp.en: Close-up of the notebook's back cover details under warm, raking light, showing a circular brown label reading "notebook — Blank Sketch Paper — 320 pages" alongside a stamp-shaped vignette of the patterned glass motif and a "PATTERNED GLASS" text badge, all printed in white on a warm brown ground.
patterned-glass-notebook/14.webp.zh: 溫暖側光下筆記本封底的近拍細節，淺灰封面上印有暖棕色圓形標籤，白字標示「notebook — Blank Sketch Paper — 320 pages」，旁側的郵票形插圖呈現玻璃壓花紋樣，下方印有「PATTERNED GLASS」文字徽章。

patterned-glass-notebook/15.webp.en: A gold-toned notebook back cover displaying product specification badges — including "Toned Gray," "100% Recycled Paper," and "Blank Sketch Paper 320 pages" — photographed through ribbed glass that refracts the image with vertical stripe distortions and soft shadow accents.
patterned-glass-notebook/15.webp.zh: 金色調的筆記本封底透過條紋玻璃拍攝，畫面因玻璃折射形成垂直條狀扭曲，封面上排列著「Toned Gray」、「100% Recycled Paper」、「Blank Sketch Paper 320 pages」等圓形與六角形規格徽章，光影柔和地落在背景上。

patterned-glass-notebook/16.webp.en: Two embossed kraft-paper bookmarks featuring patterned glass-inspired geometric textures — floral lattice, star motifs, and irregular stone — are arranged diagonally against a moody sky backdrop, with "Bookmark" printed in a handwritten script alongside a small book icon.
patterned-glass-notebook/16.webp.zh: 兩張牛皮紙材質書籤以對角線交叉排列，表面壓印出玻璃壓花風格的幾何紋樣——花卉格紋、星形圖案與不規則石材紋——並以手寫體印有「Bookmark」字樣及小書本圖示，背景為帶有雲霧感的暗調天空。
